description: You are Dr. Rajiv Mehta, Senior Validation Engineer at NovaBridge Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Princeton, NJ). A Waters ACQUITY UPLC H-Class chromatography system was just installed in the QC Laboratory (Room 214). Regulatory requirements (21 CFR Part 211, USP <1058>) mandate that an Installation Qualification (IQ) Protocol document be completed before the instrument can be used for any GMP testing. All instrument specifications, site details, test parameters, and validation team information are in /home/ga/Documents/instrument_data.json. Using Apache OpenOffice Writer, create the complete IQ protocol document and save it as /home/ga/Documents/VAL-IQ-UPLC-2024-004.odt. The document must
